appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.help: Original matches the classic HospitalRun look. Choose Abyss or Cappuccino for dark modes.

language.title: Language
language.help: Additional language translations will be added over time.

server.title: Server Connection
server.help: Switching servers signs you out and clears all local data on this device. Any records that haven't finished syncing will be lost.
server.confirmDesc: This signs you out and erases all local data on this device. Unsynced changes will be lost. Continue?

hub.title: Desktop hub
hub.lanHelp: Other devices on this network can open this address in a browser.
hub.httpWarning: The hub serves over HTTP. For production deployments with real patient data, place the hub behind a reverse proxy (Caddy, nginx) with TLS.
hub.help: Backup saves the LAN sync log, cached profiles, and signing keys to a folder of your choice. Restore picks a saved backup folder and restarts the hub automatically. Patient records on each device are cached in the browser; cloud Supabase is the canonical store.

cloud.title: Cloud Backup
cloud.connectedHelp: Local writes flush to cloud Supabase when the hub is online, and fall back to LAN-only sync when it isn't. Disconnecting reverts the hub to local-only mode.
cloud.unconnectedHelp: This hub is running locally with no cloud backup. Connect a Supabase project to mirror writes to the cloud and sync across clinic sites.
cloud.dialogDescription: Paste your Supabase project URL and anon key. LAN clients will pick up the new config on their next reload.
cloud.confirmDesc: The hub will revert to local-only mode. Records already saved on Supabase remain there, but new writes will no longer reach the cloud until you reconnect.
cloud.syncUnreachable: Sync attempted but cloud was unreachable
cloud.disconnectSuccess: Disconnected from cloud. Hub is now local-only.

team.title: Add Team Members
team.inviteDisabledTooltip: Requires SMTP — not available in offline hub mode. Use "Create user" instead.
team.createHelp: Create a user account directly — no email required. Share the password with them in person or over a secure channel.
team.shareWarning: This is the only time the password will be shown. Ask the user to change it after first login.
team.errPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
team.inviteHelp: Sends a signup link to the user's email. Requires SMTP to be configured on the server.
